record_unit: One experimental gas adsorption measurement point under one defined set of conditions.
design_note: This table keeps only fields that describe the measurement itself or its provenance. MOF structural descriptors are stored in specs/mof_materials_schema.json and linked by mof_id.

fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Stable unique measurement identifier.

fields.name: mof_id
fields.description: Foreign key to data/processed/mof_materials.csv.

fields.name: gas_type
fields.description: Adsorbate gas formula, e.g. CO2, H2, CH4, Xe, Kr.

fields.name: gas_name
fields.description: Human-readable gas name when available.

fields.name: temperature
fields.description: Measurement temperature.

fields.name: temperature_unit
fields.description: Unit for temperature.

fields.name: pressure
fields.description: Measurement pressure or pressure range for working-capacity records.

fields.name: pressure_unit
fields.description: Unit for pressure.

fields.name: capacity_value
fields.description: Adsorption capacity or reported adsorption result value.

fields.name: capacity_unit
fields.description: Unit for capacity_value.

fields.name: measurement_type
fields.description: capacity, working_capacity, selectivity, or other explicitly reported result type.

fields.name: isotherm_id
fields.description: Identifier grouping points from one isotherm or graph.

fields.name: DOI
fields.description: Source publication DOI.

fields.name: publication_year
fields.description: Publication year of the source.

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: Source identifier from specs/source_map.json.

fields.name: source_type
fields.description: scientific_paper, database_api, github_api_mirror, or other source category.

fields.name: source_database
fields.description: Database name when applicable, e.g. NIST ISODB or MOFX-DB.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: URL for the source record, JSON file, DOI page, PDF, table, or figure.

fields.name: source_location
fields.description: Generic locator inside the source, e.g. page 6 Figure 6, Table 1, articleSource=Figure 2a.

fields.name: extraction_method
fields.description: pdf_table, digitized_figure, web_api_json, github_mirror_json, or manual_review.

fields.name: extraction_confidence
fields.description: high, medium, low, or unknown.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Measurement caveats, mixture composition, unit caveats, or conflict notes.
